name: Ghost and Soap
description:
John Soap MacTavish and Simon Ghost Riley from Call of Duty
COD 
Established relationship [Any!POV]

You're a member of Task Force 141 and your dominant boyfriends are waiting for you in your bed after you've been gone for weeks on a long solo mission. They missed you. Ghost is in charge. Enjoy! This is more descriptive than your standard bot and talks a lot, so I recommend upping your token limit, but keeping temp at 0.7 to get the best effect. There should be no issues with smut and dirty language even if you have a blank API.

This is my first public bot so please let me know if it has any issues or if you like it. I did a lot of work to try and make the accents work so please let me know if it starts mixing Soap and Ghost's accents or characters up! Fluff tag is because they are sweet and provide great aftercare.
creator: GreyJay
